languages.text: "Вам повезло очнуться, Вольный Торговец. На моей памяти никто не возвращался".

traits.locale_text: "Вам повезло очнуться, Вольный Торговец. На моей памяти никто не возвращался".
"Вам повезло очнуться, Вольный Торговец. На моей памяти никто не возвращался".

languages.text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."
languages.original_text: "Вам повезло очнуться, Вольный Торговец. На моей памяти никто не возвращался".

traits.locale_text: "The sheer desire to study this creature makes you a heretic. As for this folly... You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."
"The sheer desire to study this creature makes you a heretic. As for this folly... You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."
"You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: "Du hattest Glück, dass du wieder zu Sinnen gekommen bist, Schurkenhändler. Soweit ich mich erinnere, ist das noch niemandem gelungen."
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: "Vous avez eu de la chance de retrouver vos esprits, Rogue Trader. Personne, de mémoire, ne l'a jamais fait."
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: "你很幸运能恢复理智，游侠商人。在我的记忆中没人能做到"
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: "Tuviste suerte de recuperar tus sentidos, Rogue Trader. Nadie que yo recuerde lo hizo".
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: 「正気を取り戻したのは幸運だった。私の記憶では 誰もそうじゃなかった
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."

languages.text: "Aklın başına geldiği için şanslısın, Haydut Tüccar. Hatırladığım kadarıyla hiç kimse bunu başaramamıştı."
languages.original_text: "You were fortunate to regain your senses, Rogue Trader. No one in my memory ever did."
